summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Resend email integration for FunGame auth flows. Tested 11 scenarios covering email delivery failure handling, dev_code exposure prevention, anti-enumeration, and regression tests. Found 1 minor bug in re-register path.

medium_bugs.issue: Re-register unverified email doesn't check email send result and doesn't add email_delivery='failed' when delivery fails
medium_bugs.current_behavior: Line 51: await EmailService.send_verification_code(email, code) - result not captured
medium_bugs.expected_behavior: Should capture send result and add email_delivery='failed' to response when sent=False, similar to new registration path (lines 70-77)
medium_bugs.fix_required: Change line 51 to: sent = await EmailService.send_verification_code(email, code), then add lines 52-54: if not sent.get('sent'): resp['message'] = 'Account updated, but verification email could not be delivered. Please try Resend code.'; resp['email_delivery'] = 'failed'
medium_bugs.impact: Users re-registering with unverified accounts don't get informed when email delivery fails (Resend test mode rejects unknown recipients)

passed_tests: Register with rejected recipient (@example.com) - returns 200 with email_delivery='failed' and friendly message, no dev_code exposed
Register with delivered@resend.dev - returns 200 with success message, no email_delivery field, no dev_code (real send succeeds)
Resend verification for delivered@resend.dev - returns 200 with success message, no dev_code
Forgot password for existing user (player@fungame.app) - returns 200 with generic anti-enumeration message, no dev_code, no email_delivery leak
Forgot password for non-existent email - returns same generic response (anti-enumeration working)
Regression: Login with player@fungame.app / Player@123 - returns 200 with access_token
Regression: GET /api/auth/me with token - returns 200 with user data
Regression: Login with wrong password - returns 401
Regression: Register with verified email (player@fungame.app) - returns 409
Regression: GET /api/live/teen-patti/state with auth token - returns 200 with valid round state
Cleanup: Successfully deleted test users (qa-resend-*@example.com and delivered@resend.dev)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix re-register path in /app/backend/routes_auth.py line 51: capture email send result and add email_delivery='failed' to response when delivery fails (similar to new registration path lines 70-77). This ensures users are informed when verification emails can't be delivered during re-registration.
